sentences.text: Hi, how's it going?
Hello!
It is going.
How are you?
I'm doing pretty well.
It's a beautiful day outside, so that always helps.
How about you?
Okay, lovely.
Yes, it's nice, but yes, I'm in Austin, Texas, so August is our hottest month, and it is definitely giving that so far, so….
I love your art behind you, that's so cool.
Oh my gosh, thank you!
It was literally just West Elm, but I was really excited about it.
So thank you for that.
… How are you since we spoke in… January?
What, anything new on your end?
I'm good, ….
Nothing too new, no.
Nothing….
Personally, I'll be moving pretty soon, but just moving to a new place in the same city, so… big, yeah.
Okay, got it.
Since we have spoken, I have had 3 of my close friends move to Denver.
Oh, really?
Oh my goodness!
Yes, so one of my very best friends just moved, and I'm so excited because… Yeah, the hiking in Austin, it gets… it scratches my itch occasionally, but, like, it doesn't get, like, the big job done.
So I'm looking forward to going out there and doing some of that with him, because, yeah, y'all are in the best spot to do that.
Yes, heck yeah.
Yeah, so I'm really excited about that, but, yes, other than that, no news is always good news, for the most part, and Godspeed on your move.
I'm actually also moving on the 28th, so….
Oh, nice!
Are you all ready to go?
So, like, wow, a week from today!
Yes, so here's the deal.
We're in, like, a kind of weird predicament where… The… so, we're renting, and our landlord is a builder, and we're in, like, a 1920s remodel.
She's very cute, but, like, I have raccoons in my attic as I'm speaking, like… I think that….
Yeah.
Like, they're cute, but they're a little loud.
I'm a little.
Yeah.

So, I'm just….
Yes.
I've never done that before.
But I'm really looking forward to ideally not packing anything, but of course, then unpacking will be a thing, so….
Shelby, you're gonna die, so the movers are packing for you, and they're moving for you?
Yes.
It's incredible.
It's literally the best thing ever.
You've done this before.
Yes, so, when I lived downst… I used to… I lived downstate Illinois, and we moved up to Chicago, and we, like, had never done anything like that.
I'm saying we… it was me and my partner, and, he got a company who would do it, and I remember it was, like, a couple weeks before, and I was like, I guess I should start to pack some stuff, right?
And he's like, I think they'll pack everything for you.
And they did!

than I would, but, like, you're the ones taking it, so I don't care about that.
It's It's incredible, and it's so fast.
It's so good.
Okay, thank you for saying all of that, because I, too, I'm like.
do I pack anything at all?
Like, obviously, my little plant babies, like, those are my pride and joy.
They will be moved safely.

But it sounds like, according to you, it's not, so that's very exciting.
Exactly.
It's not too good to be true, and they bring all the stuff, like, it's not, like, some, like… well, gen… I mean, the company we use, I assume it's the same way with you guys.

Like, they bring it all, they wrap… and they have that saran wrap they put around everything.
Yes, yes.
It's so good.
Yeah, it's so, so good.
Because, yes, literally, wow, okay, thank you for saying that.
You truly just eliminated a few of my fears, and, like, me just being like, I don't know how this works.
So, I'm very excited.
Thank you so much for that.
Yes, absolutely.
I'm so excited for you.
Ugh, in that case, your move's gonna go great.
It's always a lot unpacking, but your move's gonna.

Okay.
Yeah.

without it.

of residents, like, mushrooms.

Yes.

products on the Google page.

… But, yeah, it's been really fun this year to kind of see how the product has evolved.

These prospective residents are able to gather as much information on your property, on your Google business profile, because that is about where 87% of renters start their search for a new apartment on Google.
So with that being said, everything that we do is automated via integration with Yardi.

Google rewards relevant, frequent, and unique content to the profiles, with an increase in local rank on maps, as well as an increase in KPIs like property website traffic over time, of course, impressions, you know, so on and so forth.

So, with that being said… What we do via integration with Yardi 4 times a day on just your Google Business profiles, we're going to create and post content using your photos, and then we'll leverage, AI to speak to the amenities that are in the post.

rather than an apartment or unit, you know, using the verbiage home, we would make sure to align on.

No.

at the property.

right, really, to be transparency, like, the utility amounts, like, they don't have a place that, like, the other ILSs all scrape from to grab that information.
